note: The distribution + identity registry, keyed by CATEGORY of work. Every category a member can onboard carries three linked things: (1) the correct IDENTIFIERS for that kind of work (the codes that prove and pay you), (2) the PLATFORMS you distribute/earn through (deep-linked to their reports/bank), and (3) the multicolored M-Verified BADGE that category earns. Distributable categories have external platforms; service/org categories earn through deals on the floor and still carry their own identifiers + badge. 'Other' is always offered in the UI. Extend freely — the flow is dynamic per category.

industries.name: Music
industries.blurb: Streaming & download distributors that pay out on your catalog.

identifiers.name: ISRC prefix
identifiers.help: Codes every recording you own — how plays match to you worldwide.

identifiers.name: ISRC (per track)
identifiers.help: One code per recording, built from your prefix.

identifiers.name: ISWC (per song)
identifiers.help: Codes the SONG (composition), not the recording — the publishing money lane.

identifiers.name: UPC (per release)
identifiers.help: The barcode for a single/EP/album — your distributor usually assigns it.

identifiers.name: IPI / CAE
identifiers.help: Your songwriter/publisher payee ID — comes with PRO membership. The publishing lane.

identifiers.name: PRO membership
identifiers.help: ASCAP / BMI / SESAC — collects performance royalties. Get this to get paid on radio & live.

identifiers.name: Publisher / admin
identifiers.help: Who administers your publishing (self or an admin like Songtrust).

identifiers.name: ISNI
identifiers.help: Your global name ID — keeps your credits attached to YOU everywhere.

identifiers.name: DDEX DPID
identifiers.help: Your party ID in the digital supply chain — how DSPs & distributors exchange your metadata.

identifiers.name: Spotify Artist ID
identifiers.help: Claim your Spotify for Artists profile.

identifiers.name: Apple Artist ID
identifiers.help: Claim your Apple Music for Artists profile.

industries.name: Video / Film
industries.blurb: Video networks, MCNs and OTT platforms that pay on views.

identifiers.name: ISAN
identifiers.help: The international standard ID for a film/TV work — the ISRC of video.

identifiers.name: IMDb ID
identifiers.help: Your name/title record on IMDb (nmXXXXXXX / ttXXXXXXX).

identifiers.name: YouTube Channel ID
identifiers.help: Your channel ID (UCxxxx) — where AdSense pays.

identifiers.name: ISNI
identifiers.help: Your global name ID across every credits database.

industries.name: Podcast / Audio
industries.blurb: Podcast hosts & networks that pay on downloads and ads.

identifiers.name: Podcast GUID
identifiers.help: The stable ID in your RSS feed (<podcast:guid>) — how directories track your show.

identifiers.name: Apple Podcasts ID
identifiers.help: Your show's Apple Podcasts collection ID.

identifiers.name: Spotify Show ID
identifiers.help: Your show ID on Spotify for Podcasters.

identifiers.name: ISNI
identifiers.help: Your global name ID.

industries.name: Writing / Publishing
industries.blurb: Book, newsletter and article platforms that pay royalties.

identifiers.name: ISBN
identifiers.help: The barcode for a book edition — one per format.

identifiers.name: ISSN
identifiers.help: The ID for a periodical / serial (newsletter, journal).

identifiers.name: DOI
identifiers.help: A permanent link-ID for an article or dataset.

identifiers.name: ORCID
identifiers.help: The persistent ID for an author/researcher — ties all your work to one record.

identifiers.name: Amazon ASIN
identifiers.help: Your title's Amazon product ID.

identifiers.name: ISNI
identifiers.help: Your global name ID.

identifiers.name: ISNI
identifiers.help: Your global name ID as an artist.

identifiers.name: EIN
identifiers.help: Your business tax ID — the anchor for a shop that sells.

identifiers.name: VAT / Tax ID
identifiers.help: Your sales-tax / VAT registration if you sell internationally.

industries.name: Apps / Software
industries.blurb: App stores and marketplaces that pay out on sales.

identifiers.name: Apple Bundle ID
identifiers.help: Your app's reverse-DNS ID (com.you.app) in App Store Connect.

identifiers.name: Android Package
identifiers.help: Your app's package name in Play Console.

identifiers.name: EIN
identifiers.help: Your business tax ID — required to take payouts.

industries.name: Creator / Social
industries.blurb: Platforms that pay creators directly (ads, tips, funds).

identifiers.name: Instagram handle
identifiers.help: Your @handle.

identifiers.name: TikTok handle
identifiers.help: Your @handle.

identifiers.name: YouTube Channel ID
identifiers.help: Your channel ID (UCxxxx).

identifiers.name: ISNI
identifiers.help: Your global name ID.

industries.name: Studios (Venue)
industries.blurb: Recording / photo studios & event spaces. You earn through bookings on the floor — no external distributor — but you carry a venue's identifiers.

identifiers.name: EIN
identifiers.help: Your business tax ID.

identifiers.name: State Filing No.
identifiers.help: Your Secretary of State registration.

identifiers.name: Liability Insurance
identifiers.help: A certificate of general liability — required to host the public.

identifiers.name: ALEI
identifiers.help: Your machine-readable legal-entity ID.

industries.name: Stages (Live)
industries.blurb: Live venues & stages. Earn through bookings on the floor; carry a venue's identifiers.

identifiers.name: EIN
identifiers.help: Your business tax ID.

identifiers.name: State Filing No.
identifiers.help: Your Secretary of State registration.

identifiers.name: Liability Insurance
identifiers.help: A certificate of general liability.

industries.name: Programs / Civic
industries.blurb: Nonprofits, community programs & civic work. Funded by grants & the community chest; carry a nonprofit's identifiers.

identifiers.name: EIN
identifiers.help: Your federal tax ID.

identifiers.name: Charity Registration
identifiers.help: Your state charitable-solicitation license.

identifiers.name: State Filing No.
identifiers.help: Your Secretary of State registration.

identifiers.name: UEID (SAM.gov)
identifiers.help: Your ID to receive federal grants & contracts.

industries.name: Photo / Media Services
industries.blurb: Photographers, videographers & media pros. You earn through deals on the floor; carry your creator identity.

identifiers.name: ISNI
identifiers.help: Your global name ID.

identifiers.name: EIN
identifiers.help: Your business tax ID (if you operate as a business).

industries.name: Web / Tech Services
industries.blurb: Web, design & tech builders. Earn through deals on the floor; carry your creator identity.

identifiers.name: ISNI
identifiers.help: Your global name ID.

identifiers.name: EIN
identifiers.help: Your business tax ID.
